emails.subject: Urgent Strategy Meeting
emails.body: Hi, we need to schedule a critical strategy session for this Friday at 10 AM. Please confirm if you can make it.

emails.subject: Wire Transfer Approval for Invoice #4892
emails.body: Please approve the wire transfer of $15,400 to vendor Acme Corp. The invoice and agreement are attached.

past_replies.subject: Strategy Meeting
past_replies.reply: Yes, I can confirm for Friday at 10 AM. See you there!
